name: IdsEdwClmLnHlthCstGrpReplFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CLM_LN_SK, 1 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 0 AS MR_CASE_ADM_CT, 0 AS MR_PROC_CT, 0 AS MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, 'NA' AS CASE_ADM_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_DTL_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_SK, 0 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 0 AS MR_CASE_ADM_CT, 0 AS MR_PROC_CT, 0 AS MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, 'UNK' AS CASE_ADM_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_DTL_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID), cte_main AS (SELECT CLM.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_RPLC_SK AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, CLM.CLM_ID AS CLM_ID, CLM.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CD2.TRGT_CD AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, CD1.TRGT_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLM.CLM_LN_SK AS CLM_LN_SK, CLM.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, CLM.MR_CASE_ADM_CT AS MR_CASE_ADM_CT, CLM.MR_PROC_CT AS MR_PROC_CT, CLM.MR_UNIT_DAY_CT AS MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, CLM.CASE_ADM_ID AS CASE_ADM_ID, CLM.MR_LN_ID AS MR_LN_ID, UPPER(CLM.MR_LN_CASE_ID) AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, CLM.MR_LN_DTL_ID AS MR_LN_DTL_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLM.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLM.FCLTY_CASE_ID AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, CLM.VRSN_ID AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_RPLC CLM JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON CLM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON CLM.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CLM.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CLM.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_RPLC_SK <> 1 AND CLM.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_RPLC_SK <> 0) SELECT * FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_main
